checklist.criteria: Demonstrates mastery of foundational document structure using standard HTML5 elements.
Applies semantic markup to enhance content clarity and accessibility.
Constructs and validates forms with appropriate input types and user feedback mechanisms.
Implements accessible markup practices including ARIA roles and descriptive attributes.
Applies foundational SEO principles through structured content and metadata.
Utilizes selectors and styling properties to create visually coherent interfaces.
Applies box model concepts and layout techniques to control element positioning.
Designs responsive layouts using media/container queries and scalable units.
Constructs flexible and grid-based layouts using Flexbox and CSS Grid.
Enhances user experience through transitions, animations, and visual effects.
Applies core utility classes without relying on custom CSS.
Uses breakpoint prefixes and variants to build adaptive, interactive interfaces.
Customizes design tokens directly in CSS using the CSS-first configuration model.
Leverages cascade layers and container queries to build flexible, scalable designs.
Integrates into modern frameworks with minimal configuration.
Writes syntactically correct code using variables, control structures, and data types.
Defines and invokes functions with appropriate scope and closure awareness.
Manipulates the DOM and handles user interactions effectively.
Implements asynchronous logic using Promises and async/await.
Utilizes modern ES6+ features to write clean, modular, and maintainable code.
Applies static typing to variables, functions, and data structures for improved reliability.
Defines interfaces and custom types to enforce consistent data contracts.
Leverages type inference and narrowing to enhance code safety and readability.
Implements generic types to build reusable and type-safe components.
Configures and maintains TypeScript projects using tsconfig.json and build tools.
Develops functional components using JSX and adheres to React conventions.
Manages component state and data flow using props and useState.
Handles user input and form logic within component boundaries.
Utilizes React hooks such as useEffect and useRef to manage side effects and references.
Structures applications with reusable components and context for scalable state management.
Implements file-based routing and dynamic page generation.
Applies static and server-side rendering strategies using Next.js data-fetching methods.
Develops backend functionality through API routes within the application.
Optimizes performance using built-in components for images and metadata.
Deploys applications with environment configuration and version control best practices.
Develops object-oriented programs using encapsulation, inheritance, and polymorphism.
Utilizes Java collections and control structures to manage data and logic flow.
Implements robust error handling through exception management and custom exceptions.
Performs file operations using Java I/O streams and readers.
Constructs multithreaded applications with synchronization and concurrency control.
Writes clean and efficient code using core data structures and control flow.
Organizes functionality using modular design and built-in libraries.
Handles file operations and exceptions with Pythonic conventions.
Implements object-oriented principles and decorators for reusable logic.
Manages environments and dependencies while utilizing popular libraries for development.
Initializes repositories, stages changes, commits with meaningful messages, and views commit history.
Creates and switches branches, merges changes, and resolves simple merge conflicts.
Connects to remote repositories, pushes and pulls changes, and collaborates using git.
Reverts changes, resets commits, and manages work-in-progress without losing context.
Applies Git in team workflows, uses .gitignore effectively, and understands rebasing and squash merges.
Understands how to deploy web applications using Vercel's dashboard or CLI.
Configures environment variables for different stages using Vercel's UI.
Troubleshoots build errors and optimize performance using Vercel's analytics.
Assigns custom domains, configure DNS records, and manage redirects or rewrites.
Collaborates with team members and manages project roles using preview deployments and Git.
